creator: rozhuk.im@gmail.com
text:
AMD Ryzen 2700x (8C16T)

python 2.7
env CCACHE_RECACHE=1 /usr/bin/time -h make -j1
	1m19.44s real		1m6.15s user		11.46s sys
env CCACHE_RECACHE=1 /usr/bin/time -h make
	51.66s real		1m20.44s user		13.58s sys

python 3.6
env CCACHE_RECACHE=1 /usr/bin/time -h make -j1
	1m26.09s real		1m49.80s user		15.15s sys
env CCACHE_RECACHE=1 /usr/bin/time -h make
	49.08s real		2m10.29s user		17.06s sys
